title: Career Opportunity Store Manager at Reliance Retail

jsonLd.title: Career Opportunity Store Manager at Reliance Retail
jsonLd.description:
Reliance Retail invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Store Manager at our Pimpri-Chinchwad location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Reliance Retail:
Reliance Retail is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Professional development and training programs
• Learning & development budget
• Annual performance appraisal
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Pimpri-Chinchwad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Reliance Retail!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
